§1.1.title: Career Objective
§1.1.text: Solution-oriented software professional with 8.5 years of experience in software development and consulting. Seeking to leverage expertise in .NET, C#, automation, and CI/CD to deliver scalable, high-quality solutions in a dynamic environment.

§1.2.title: Skills
§1.2.text:
Backend Development: REST APIs using .NET Core C# and MS SQL
Test Automation: C#, Selenium, SQL Server, Page Object Model
BDD Tools: SpecFlow, Cucumber
Methodologies: SDLC, STLC, Agile Scrum
CI/CD: Azure DevOps, GitHub Actions
Cloud: Microsoft Azure (App Services, Service Bus, Key Vault)
Tools: Postman, JIRA, Git, Visual Studio

§1.3.title: Experience
§1.3.text:
Senior Consultant - Development
Infogain India Pvt. Ltd.
Project: Mitchell International - Casualty Insurance Claims & Software Solutions
Jul 2016 – Present

Roles & Responsibilities:
- Designed and implemented REST APIs for backend services, ensuring scalability and high availability
- Built end-to-end BDD test automation framework using SpecFlow, Selenium, and Page Object Model
- Maintained and enhanced CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps
- Collaborated with cross-functional teams across insurance domain (claims processing, casualty analytics)
- Performed code reviews, debugging, and performance optimisation on .NET Core C# services
- Worked within Agile SCRUM methodology with two-week sprint cycles

§1.4.title: Strengths
§1.4.text:
Strong programming expertise in .NET and C#
Proficient in SQL Server and database optimisation
Skilled in debugging, troubleshooting, and delivering under pressure
Effective communicator with clients and cross-functional teams
Quick learner and adaptable to new technologies

§1.5.title: Achievements / Certifications
§1.5.text:
Star Performer Award — Oct 2020 (Infogain India Pvt. Ltd.)
Spot Award — Aug 2020
Spot Award — Jun 2023

§1.6.text:
B.Tech (Information Technology)
